ctxMarket: Attention is focused on institutional adoption and infrastructure upgrades. Solana is in the spotlight following Morgan Stanley’s integration and several core software releases.
ctxTalking:
• Morgan Stanley adding Solana trading for E*Trade customers
• Pyth Network’s expansion into institutional bond pricing and Asian markets
• Multiple Solana infrastructure projects shipping new releases
ctxMatters: Morgan Stanley’s move could broaden Solana’s reach among traditional investors. Pyth’s push into institutional finance signals growing demand for on-chain data services. Ongoing upgrades across Solana’s ecosystem may improve performance and developer tools.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Major financial institutions and data providers are deepening their involvement with Solana.
Noise: Short-term price moves tied to unlocks or isolated events.
ctxGlossary:
PYTH — A decentralized data oracle network providing real-world data to blockchains.
Firedancer — An independent validator client aiming to boost Solana’s speed and reliability.

readMore.title: Pyth Network’s TradFi push gains steam as PYTH nears $0.05
Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade
